title: Precision Editorial Depth
summary: A crisp black and white editorial treatment of the V8 quiet-rail structure, with one publication-desk pane, persistent site status, sparse chrome, and depth used only as visual hierarchy.

title: Warm Paper Studio
summary: A tactile paper-and-ink V8 variation that keeps the live iframe at z0, uses a quiet rail plus one paper pane, and escalates Library and reset flows into stacked-sheet overlays.

title: Mica OS Depth
summary: A Windows/Mica-inspired V8 prototype for WordPress Playground: one live iframe at z0, a restrained two-door quiet rail, one settings-app secondary pane, z3 Library and reset overlays, and a persistent Sites widget as the only active site identity.

title: Material Elevation Rail
summary: A Material 3 interpretation of the V8 quiet rail structure using explicit elevation tokens, state layers, a persistent Sites widget, one Manager pane, and z3 Library/reset overlays.

title: Developer Console Pro
summary: A DevTools-inspired V8 Playground redesign with a real z0 iframe, two-item quiet rail, one dense inspector pane, persistent Sites status, structured logs, and z3 Library/reset overlays.

title: Premium Product Glass
summary: A restrained high-end SaaS treatment for the V8 quiet-rail structure: one live iframe at z0, two-icon quiet rail, one glass secondary pane, z3 Library/reset overlays, and a persistent jewel-like Sites status object that carries site identity without duplicating it in the top chrome.

title: Bento Operations Depth
summary: A Bento Operations variation of the V8 quiet-rail structure: the live iframe stays z0, a two-door rail opens one modular operations pane, Library/reset escalate to z3, and a persistent Sites status widget carries the current playground identity without duplicating it in the top chrome.

title: Swiss Corporate Rail
summary: A Swiss corporate interpretation of the V8 quiet rail structure with labeled enterprise navigation, dense forms and tables, a persistent Sites status widget, and z3 Library/reset overlays.

title: Mobile-First Bottom Rail
summary: A mobile-canonical V8 redesign where the live iframe stays z0, Sites and Manager live behind a two-item bottom rail, one bottom sheet swaps all secondary work, and Library/reset use z3 overlays.

title: Spatial Calm Depth
summary: A calm spatial-memory treatment for the V8 quiet-rail structure: the real iframe remains z0, a two-dock rail and one secondary pane sit at measured depth tiers, z3 Library/reset overlays handle temporary focus, and the persistent Sites widget carries live identity without duplicating it in the top chrome.
